headline: Here’s What Mizuho Thinks About Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL)
summary: ​Royal Caribbean Cruises Ltd. (NYSE:RCL) ranks among our Best Value Stocks to Buy for Long Term Investment. On May 1, Mizuho raised the firm’s price target on Royal Caribbean Cruises Ltd. (NYSE:RCL) from $377 to $380, and maintained an Outperform rating on the stock. ​The rating follows Royal Caribbean’s Q1 2026 earnings release announced on […]

headline: TD Cowen Raised PT On ​Carnival Corporation (CCL), Here’s Why
summary: ​Carnival Corporation Ltd. (NYSE:CCL) is one of the Best Value Stocks to Buy for Long Term Investment. headline: Viking Holdings Incurs Loss in Q1, Lags Revenue Estimates
summary: VIK's first-quarter 2026 revenues benefit from increased Capacity Passenger Cruise Days (capacity PCDs) and higher revenue per PCD in 2026.
